requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 and SSB Conformity as International Baseline for Suriname BESS Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619及SSB合格评定作为苏里南BESS项目验收的国际基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619及SSB合格評定作為蘇里南BESS項目驗收的國際基準

summary.en: Suriname does not currently have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation. SSB (Suriname Standards Bureau, Surinaams Standaardisatie Bureau) is the national standards body responsible for adopting and promulgating national standards. SSB has been progressively aligning Suriname's national standards with IEC and ISO international standards, consistent with Suriname's obligations as a CARICOM member and its participation in regional standardisation efforts. No SSB technical regulation specifically mandating IEC 62619 certification as a pre-import condition for BESS has been confirmed from official sources as of the dataset date — exporters should verify the current SSB regulated-product scope directly with SSB before shipment. However, IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally expected safety standard for lithium BESS cells and modules. For utility-scale and C&I BESS projects in Suriname — including projects related to TotalEnergies' GranMorgu offshore oil development and associated onshore power infrastructure — project owners, EPC contractors, and EAS licensing requirements are expected to reference IEC 62619 compliance as a technical prerequisite. IEC 62133 (Safety Requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries) is additionally referenced for smaller BESS module assemblies in some project specifications.
summary.zh: 苏里南目前尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规。SSB（苏里南标准局，Surinaams Standaardisatie Bureau）是负责采纳和颁布国家标准的国家标准机构。SSB正逐步将苏里南国家标准与IEC和ISO国际标准接轨，与苏里南作为CARICOM成员的义务及其参与区域标准化工作相一致。截至本数据集日期，尚未从官方来源确认SSB专门强制要求IEC 62619认证作为BESS进口前置条件的技术法规——出口商在出货前应直接向SSB核实现行SSB受监管产品范围。然而，IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）是锂BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全标准。对于苏里南公用事业规模和工商业BESS项目——包括与TotalEnergies GranMorgu海上石油开发及相关陆上电力基础设施有关的项目——项目业主、EPC承包商及EAS许可要求，预计将以IEC 62619合规作为技术前提。对于某些项目规格中的较小BESS模组组件，IEC 62133（便携式密封二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）亦被额外引用。
summary.zht: 蘇里南目前尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規。SSB（蘇里南標準局，Surinaams Standaardisatie Bureau）是負責採納和頒布國家標準的國家標準機構。SSB正逐步將蘇里南國家標準與IEC和ISO國際標準接軌，與蘇里南作為CARICOM成員的義務及其參與區域標準化工作相一致。截至本數據集日期，尚未從官方來源確認SSB專門強制要求IEC 62619認證作為BESS進口前置條件的技術法規——出口商在出貨前應直接向SSB核實現行SSB受監管產品範圍。然而，IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）是鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全標準。對於蘇里南公用事業規模和工商業BESS項目——包括與TotalEnergies GranMorgu海上石油開發及相關陸上電力基礎設施有關的項目——項目業主、EPC承包商及EAS許可要求，預計將以IEC 62619合規作為技術前提。對於某些項目規格中的較小BESS模組組件，IEC 62133（便攜式密封二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）亦被額外引用。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in Suriname project specifications and EAS licensing)

IEC 62133-2:2017 — Safety Requirements for Portable Sealed Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Portable Applications (referenced in some project specifications for smaller BESS module assemblies)
IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety reference in project specifications)

SSB (Surinaams Standaardisatie Bureau) — national standards body; verify current regulated-product list directly with SSB before shipment; no confirmed mandatory BESS-specific technical regulation as of dataset date

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in EES. These Chinese standards are not accepted as equivalents to IEC 62619 in Suriname project specifications or SSB conformity assessment. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance when supplying BESS cells and modules to Suriname projects.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电力储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。上述中国标准不被苏里南项目规格或SSB合格评定接受为IEC 62619的等效依据。出口商在向苏里南项目供应BESS电芯和模组时，除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619型式试验证书。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電力儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。上述中國標準不被蘇里南項目規格或SSB合格評定接受為IEC 62619的等效依據。出口商在向蘇里南項目供應BESS電芯和模組時，除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619型式試驗證書。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)

gap.en: Critical gap: Suriname project owners and EAS licensing requirements are expected to reference IEC 62619 as the technical safety baseline for BESS cells and modules. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes in project technical specifications or SSB conformity assessment. Exporters should: (a) verify the current SSB regulated-product list for any mandatory pre-shipment conformity obligation for BESS cells and modules — contact SSB directly as no publicly confirmed mandatory regulation has been identified; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules supplied to Suriname BESS projects; (c) confirm the applicable IEC 62619 edition referenced in the project specification or EAS licensing conditions before committing to a test programme; (d) where project specifications also reference IEC 62133, confirm whether module-level assemblies require separate IEC 62133 assessment.
gap.zh: 关键差距：苏里南项目业主和EAS许可要求预计将以IEC 62619作为BESS电芯和模组的技术安全基准。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未与IEC 62619协调，不被项目技术规格或SSB合格评定接受为替代依据。出口商应：（a）核实现行SSB受监管产品清单，确认BESS电芯和模组是否存在强制装运前合格评定义务——直接联系SSB，因为尚未确认任何公开强制法规；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至苏里南BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（c）在启动测试计划前确认项目规格或EAS许可条件中引用的IEC 62619版本；（d）若项目规格同时引用IEC 62133，确认模组级组件是否须单独进行IEC 62133评估。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：蘇里南項目業主和EAS許可要求預計將以IEC 62619作為BESS電芯和模組的技術安全基準。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未與IEC 62619協調，不被項目技術規格或SSB合格評定接受為替代依據。出口商應：（a）核實現行SSB受監管產品清單，確認BESS電芯和模組是否存在強制裝運前合格評定義務——直接聯繫SSB，因為尚未確認任何公開強制法規；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至蘇里南BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（c）在啟動測試計畫前確認項目規格或EAS許可條件中引用的IEC 62619版本；（d）若項目規格同時引用IEC 62133，確認模組級組件是否須單獨進行IEC 62133評估。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice where EAS or project-owner specifications require IEC 62619 compliance; SSB mandatory regulatory obligation for BESS cells has not been confirmed from official sources as of dataset date — verify directly with SSB
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard (GB designation) for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation has been identified for Suriname as of the dataset date; however, IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in Suriname project specifications and EAS licensing conditions. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient for Suriname project acceptance. Verify SSB current regulated-product scope and confirm IEC 62619 evidence requirements with the project owner, EAS, and any appointed conformity assessment body before shipment. Dutch-language documentation may be required for SSB and EAS submissions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，苏里南尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规；然而，IEC 62619是苏里南项目规格和EAS许可条件中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足苏里南项目验收要求。出货前请核实SSB现行受监管产品范围，并向项目业主、EAS及任何指定合格评定机构确认IEC 62619证据要求。SSB和EAS申报可能需要荷兰语文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，蘇里南尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規；然而，IEC 62619是蘇里南項目規格和EAS許可條件中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足蘇里南項目驗收要求。出貨前請核實SSB現行受監管產品範圍，並向項目業主、EAS及任何指定合格評定機構確認IEC 62619證據要求。SSB和EAS申報可能需要荷蘭語文件。
